questionHtml: Methane is another greenhouse gas. Contrast the reasons why methane and carbon dioxide are considered significant greenhouse gases.
markschemeHtml:
carbon dioxide is highly/more abundant «in the atmosphere» ✔

methane is more effective/potent «as a greenhouse gas»
OR
methane/better/more effective at absorbing IR «radiation»
OR
methane has greater greenhouse factor
OR
methane has greater global warming potential/GWP✔


Accept “carbon dioxide contributes more to global warming” for M1.

meta.title: Methane is another greenhouse gas. Contrast the reasons why methane and carbon dioxide are considered significant greenhouse gases.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.3.3—Fossil fuels include coal, crude oil and natural gas, which have different advantages and disadvantages. Evaluate the amount of carbon dioxide added to the atmosphere when different fuels burn. Understand the link between carbon dioxide levels and the greenhouse effect.
